title: Google Reveals The Top Searches Of 2025
text: Google's AI assistant Gemini dominated worldwide search interest globally, followed by sports-related queries. India vs England cricket matches, the Club World Cup, and other international tournaments generated significant search volume. American searches diverged from global patterns, with political figure Charlie Kirk leading trending searches. Entertainment properties like KPop Demon Hunters and the iPhone 17 ranked prominently. Actor Mikey Madison topped global searches following her acclaimed performance in Anora, while Pedro Pascal led searches in the United States. Books by Colleen Hoover and Rebecca Yarros dominated literary searches across both regions. AI-generated content captured everyone's attention in the US, with AI-created images and characters topping trend lists, including viral AI Barbie and AI action figures. Travel searches focused on major cities like Boston, Seattle, and Tokyo, and European destinations like Prague and Edinburgh. Google Maps revealed iconic bookstores as popular search destinations globally.
